recommendations.title: Catfight
recommendations.overview: The rivalry between two former college friends comes to a head when they both attend the same glamorous event.

recommendations.title: The Skulls
recommendations.overview: A senior at an Ivy League college, who depends on scholarships and working on the side, gets accepted into the secret society The Skulls. He hopes it betters chances at Harvard but The Skulls is not what he thought and comes at a price.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Paths of Glory
recommendations.overview: A commanding officer defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: Pretty Village, Pretty Flame
recommendations.overview: In the opening stages of the Bosnian War, a small group of Serbian soldiers are trapped in a tunnel by a Muslim force.

recommendations.title: Leaves of Grass
recommendations.overview: An Ivy League professor returns home, where his pot-growing twin brother has concocted a plan to take down a local drug lord.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon Presents Dorm Daze
recommendations.overview: When a foreign-exchange student and a hooker - both named Dominique - show up on a college campus, the unsuspecting student body is in for the education of a lifetime!

recommendations.title: The French Dispatch of the Liberty, Kansas Evening Sun
recommendations.overview: The staff of an American magazine based in France puts out its last issue, with stories featuring an artist sentenced to life imprisonment, student riots, and a kidnapping resolved by a chef.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.
